summary: Comprehensive testing of Membership Card feature. All features working correctly: card front/back display, flip animation, photo upload button, download PDF/Image buttons, share functionality, profile details, validity section.
passed_tests: Member Dashboard loads with membership card displayed
Card front side shows member photo placeholder, name, ID, QR code, plan, validity
Card back side shows terms, contact info, usage instructions
Flip card button toggles between front and back
Upload Photo button is present and functional
Download PDF button triggers card download
Download Image button triggers image download
Share button is present and functional
Profile Details section displays member information
Membership Validity section displays dates
Card has credit card dimensions note
Member dashboard loads with member data
Dashboard has tab navigation (My Card, Experiences, Benefits)
Membership card displays correctly
QR code renders on membership card
Download card button is present and functional
Share card button is present and functional
Membership validity section displays correctly
Profile details show member information
Experiences tab shows lifestyle image gallery
Benefits tab shows partner discounts
Logout button works correctly
seed_data_creation: Using existing test member (mobile: 7777777777, password: member123)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All membership card features tested and working: 1) Card front side displays member photo placeholder, name, member ID, QR code, plan name, validity. 2) Card back side shows terms & conditions, how to use instructions, contact info, emergency contact. 3) Flip card button toggles between front and back views. 4) Upload Photo button present (triggers file input). 5) Download PDF and Download Image buttons functional. 6) Share button works (falls back to clipboard in headless). 7) Card dimensions note shows credit card size (85.6mm x 53.98mm). Note: Test member 7777777777 exists in users collection but NOT in members collection - dashboard uses fallback data from user object. Photo upload will return 404 for this member until a member record is created.

notes.photo_upload_endpoint: POST /api/members/{member_id}/photo - works but requires member record in members collection
notes.card_design: Credit card size 85.6mm x 53.98mm, front and back sides for double-sided printing
